arabic_text:
شعلہ
آگ کا کرہ
ہوا کا کرہ
پانی کا کرہ
مٹی کا کرہ
english_text:
Flame
Sphere of Fire (FIRE)
Sphere of Air (AIR)
Sphere of Water (WATER)
Sphere of Earth (EARTH)
Heat
alt_text: A vertical diagram of the four elemental spheres beneath a moon at the top, with each elemental sphere labeled in Urdu and English. From top to bottom: شعلہ/Flame (a small fire at the moon's edge), آگ کا کرہ/Sphere of FIRE (orange band), ہوا کا کرہ/Sphere of AIR (light blue band), پانی کا کرہ/Sphere of WATER (light grey band), مٹی کا کرہ/Sphere of EARTH (dark brown band at the base). A red-to-blue vertical heat-scale gradient on the right shows decreasing heat from top to bottom.
notes: Vertical arrangement of the four elements with the moon (and flame) at the apex, illustrating that fire/heat is highest and earth/cold is lowest in the natural ordering of the elements.
